## Structure

```
MOSAIC/
├── LICENSE
├── RESEARCH_PLAN.md        # Research plan (Phase 3 output)
├── RESULTS.md              # Living results document
├── TRAINING_LOG.md         # Training run log
├── src/                    # Source code
│   ├── models/
│   ├── data/
│   ├── training/
│   ├── evaluation/
│   └── utils/
├── experiments/            # Experiment configs and outputs
├── figures/                # Publication-quality figures
├── paper/                  # Draft paper sections
├── logs/                   # Raw training logs
└── notebooks/              # Analysis notebooks
```
